docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE AS PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED IN COURT THE DAY OF THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $128.80 SERVED OCT-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, MARIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY BIRNBAUM, ZOE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRNBAUM, ZOE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, MARIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
